name: Nanami Kento
description:
THE HITMAN | JJKxYAKUZA series

"𝐓𝐜𝐡. 𝐌𝐲 𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐟𝐭𝐬' 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐦𝐞." |

where you witness something you shouldn't have and now you're Nanami's problem.

this is the first of my new series -- JJKxYAKUZA.

this will be a collection of bots based on the following characters (so far, more may be added if people want)*:

  1. Nanami Kento as the shateigashira (second lieutenant) of Masamichi-gumi or the hitman

  2. Gojo Satoru as the oyabun of Masamichi-gumi or the boss

  3. Geto Suguru as the wakagashira (first lieutenant) of Masamichi-gumi or the gentleman

  4. Ryomen Sukuna as the oyabun of Ryomen-kumi or the devil

  5. Toji Fushiguro as the wakagashira of Ryomen-kumi or the assassin

*this is not indicative of the order these bots will be released.

potential characters to be released under this series:

  1. Choso Kamo as the shateigashira of Ryomen-kumi or the double agent

  2. Shoko Ieiri as the medic of Masamichi-gumi or the doctor

  3. Shiu Kong as an agent of the NPA or the detective

all bots under this series will occur within the same universe. in other words, the positions of each character will remain consistent within individual bots. please be sure to read character definition for specific character information.

as the "first message" of these bots may be longer (>650 tokens), i recommend having your generation settings set max tokens to 600. this prevents really long messages which are common in bots with long initial messages.

as a final message, please enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"unexpected plot twist"
